purpose: Detailed machine-readable snapshot of the single current executable session.

currentSession.title: Add batch QA gate command for generated outputs
currentSession.objective: Wrap the existing loudness, clipping, and loop QA primitives in a batch CLI command that reports pass/fail per asset and writes a machine-readable QA report.
currentSession.whyItMatters: Without a batch QA gate, generated assets have no automated first-pass acceptance check before promotion to approved/. The existing 'audio-engine qa' command works on individual files only.

conditionalModify.condition: only if a batch QA helper class fits naturally in this module

minimum: one /tmp smoke run confirming QA report is written for a generated batch output directory

doneCriteriaSummary: A qa-batch CLI command accepts a directory and reports pass/fail per audio file.
Command writes a machine-readable QA report JSON with file, status, and per-check results.
Tests cover at least one passing and one failing case.
The existing audio-engine qa single-file command is preserved.
Docs reflect the new command truthfully.
fixturePolicy: Use the committed example artifacts under docs/AI_FACTORY/EXAMPLES/gamerewritten_vertical_slice/ as the default fixtures.
Use generated /tmp outputs from the batch pipeline as test fixtures for QA pass/fail cases where needed.
